description: Introduction to various strategies for integrating climate science into water resources, specifically addressing climatic influences on hydrologic variables, the prospects for prediction, and the implications on water management and development. Consider both space and time variability of hydrological processes in the context of sub-seasonal, seasonal, and climate change time-scales.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: CIV ENGR 415and (STAT 224,311, or324), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
